positive: A whimsical, cartoon-style illustration of a group of anthropomorphic kitchen utensils (whisk, spatula, rolling pin) having a tea party. Style: Pixar/Disney animation quality, soft shading, bright pastel colors, joyful, highly expressive characters.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, scary, dark, realistic
